quicksight.template.templateversion.Crea.Description: The time that this template version was created.

quicksight.template.templateversion.Data.Description: Schema of the dataset identified by the placeholder. Any dashboard created from this template should be bound to new datasets matching the same schema described through this API operation.

quicksight.template.templateversion.Erro.Description: Errors associated with this template version.

quicksight.template.templateversion.Shee.Description: A list of the associated sheets with the unique identifier and name of each sheet.

quicksight.template.templateversion.Sour.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an analysis or template that was used to create this template.

quicksight.template.templateversion.Stat.Description: The status that is associated with the template.  +  `CREATION_IN_PROGRESS` +  `CREATION_SUCCESSFUL` +  `CREATION_FAILED` +  `UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS` +  `UPDATE_SUCCESSFUL` +  `UPDATE_FAILED` +  `DELETED`
quicksight.template.templateversion.Stat.Allowed values: CREATION_FAILED | CREATION_IN_PROGRESS | CREATION_SUCCESSFUL | DELETED | UPDATE_FAILED | UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS | UPDATE_SUCCESSFUL

quicksight.template.templateversion.Them.Description: The ARN of the theme associated with this version of the template.

quicksight.template.templateversion.Vers.Description: The version number of the template version.
